wrong_job: You don't have the required job.
job_not_started: You haven't started the job yet.
need_item: You (or the team) need the required item to start.
dont_have_deposit: You don't have $%s for the vehicle deposit.
deposit_charged: Deposit of $%s charged (refunded when you return the vehicle).
deposit_lost: You abandoned the job and lost the $%s deposit.
already_in_lobby: You are already in the lobby.
player_far: The invited player is too far away.
not_owner: You are not the lobby owner.
target_busy: This task is being done by another player.
vehicle_in_spawn: Can't start: a vehicle is in the spawn zone.
need_ladder: Build a ladder near the pole first.
need_lift: Build a lift near the pole first.
deliver_vehicle: Deliver the vehicle at the marked point
